name: Magnezone
description: Large magnet UFO with a red eye, two magnets for a pair of hands, one as a tail, and yellow antenna. Typically for most fully evolved mons, it‘s got a rather rough, deep voice, almost robotic. Electric and steel type and Magnemite’s last evolved form. Aggressive at first, but not a heartless asshole, damn it lol
creator: MaggotWithFries
